programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Focusing on the most pressing social issues people face by narrating numerous human stories and hosting several experts to discuss possible solutions for each problem, thus benefiting the viewers. Abdullah Al Zarouni.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: Our Nation Is A Secretariat
programme.desc: Technology The documentation of the tireless efforts and profound sacrifices made by police officers across the Emirates stands as a powerful testament to their unwavering commitment and courage in keeping the country safe. Sofia Di Fay.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Focusing on the most pressing social issues people face by narrating numerous human stories and hosting several experts to discuss possible solutions for each problem, thus benefiting the viewers. Abdullah Al Zarouni.

programme.title: My Family Home
programme.desc: In 1940s Damascus, the murder of famed doctor Abd Al Rahman Al Shahbandar sends shockwaves through a quiet neighborhood. As suspicion falls on everyone, the sudden return of the enigmatic Nouri raises questions, and maybe answers. Ayman Zidan, Salom Haddaad, Sabah Barakat, Abdul Fatah Al Myzayen, Safaa Soltan, Tamer Eshak, Fouad Shorbagy, Tamer Isaak, Ayman Zeidan, Abd Elfatah Almozyen, Safaa Sultaan, Tamer Isaac, Salloum Haddad.

programme.title: The Postman
programme.desc: Newton, the mailman, causes problems for many of the people he delivers letters to, which threatens his fate, as this prompts them to file complaints against him at his workplace. Gaber Nghmosh, Jomaa Ali, Metha Mohamed, Khalil Alrimisy, Mais Kumar , Marwa Khalil, Albassam Ali, Mohamed Al Qaffaas, Ahmed Al Fardan, Juma Ali, Maitha mohammed, Khalil Al Romaithi, Mays Gumir, Mohammad Al Qaffaas, Ahmad Al Fardan, Hamad Al Shahabi, Mohammad Al Qaffas, Hamad Al Shehabi, Jaber Naghmoush.

programme.title: Rhyme
programme.desc: Arts Hosting specialists in poetry and culture to discuss the details of traditional poems and the various poets' creativity in using meter and rhyme. It also delves into the details of their journey and success. Abdullah Alkarbi.

programme.title: International News
programme.desc: Newscast Comprehensive coverage of all the breaking Arab and global news comes to you live from the heart of the events, and hosts officials and decision-makers to learn their opinions.

programme.desc: Discussing the most important societal and family topics, particularly marital relations and the proper way to ensure the psychological and physical well-being of children, from an Islamic perspective, drawing on the Qur'an and Sunnah. George Sakr, Maria Al Hattali.

programme.desc: After believing his terrifying past had ended after five years of calm, Soliman is still haunted with his old nightmares. His present life, on the other hand, is filled with constant dangers threatening his safety and stability. Hafidh Laibee, Samar Muhammad, Hafeth Laibee.

programme.title: Nine Wives
programme.desc: After a man decides to marry nine women, he is put in a constant whirlwind of problems and humorous situations caused by their differing personalities and the many family conflicts that arise under one roof. Alaa Al Ebrahimi, Maryam Kamal Aldeen, Alaa Al Ibrahimi, Maryam Kamal Al Deen, Maryam Kamal Al Deen.

programme.title: Naked Souls
programme.desc: Samer finds out his wife's betrayal leading her to escape from the house. Then she meets the barber Salah who tries to help her. But eventually he falls in love with her. Sulafa Memar, Kosai Khauli.

programme.title: Mesopotamia Reader
programme.desc: Listen daily during Ramadan to reflections and stories from the Quran with the Mesopotamia Reader Podcast.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Investigation Extensive coverage of the latest news and current events.

programme.title: Your Eftar On Us
programme.desc: People Traveling all over Iraq to eat Eftar everyday with different Iraqi family. Enjoying the amazing food of Chef Hussien Sawady and valuable stunning awards. Ali Al Abayji, Yasmine Mekki.

programme.title: Upon Your Intentions You Will Be Granted
programme.desc: Through real-life stories of ordinary Iraqi families, the program reveals how sincere intentions and good deeds can open unexpected doors to livelihood, taking viewers on a heartfelt journey filled with hope and optimism. Waseem Osama, Shaima Emad.

programme.title: Summary
programme.desc: Debate Another dimension to review the political problems in Iraq and the Arab world with a wonderful selection of the best political analysts. Aya Alqam, Ahmad Khedr, Maher Adnan.

programme.title: Bat Live
programme.desc: People Receiving video calls from the audience and the hosts presents the proverb's story. The audience has to figure out what the intended proverb is to win a sum of money. Haifa Hassouni.

programme.title: The Third Half
programme.desc: Show Presenting coverages of different tournaments, and reviewing sports news. Mohamed Ibrahim Al Naser.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: Temporary Walk
programme.desc: Nature Amid the growing threat to biodiversity from noise and light pollution, bold experiments are being conducted worldwide, revealing the impact of total darkness and complete silence on wildlife.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Amazing Solutions
programme.desc: People Man uses science and intelligence to invent devices that enhance his daily life and create luxury once considered fantasy.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus

programme.title: News Bulletin

programme.desc: Teen Titans Robin, Beast Boy, and the others are good at saving their city and the world. But when that is not the case, they have silly troubles getting by everyday without adults. Luke Cormican, Peter Rida Michail, Michael Jelenic, Aaron Horvath, Greg Cipes, Scott Menville.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Every day, the troublemaker 12-year-old cat Gumball causes a new problem alongside his goldfish brother Darwin, which leads to more shenanigans, as he never learns from his mistakes. Dan Russell, Teresa Gallagher, Jacob Hopkins, Kyla Rae Kowalewski, Terrell Ransom Jr, Mic Graves, Ben Bocquelet.

programme.title: Back To Back
programme.desc: While their owners are engrossed in their studies, Ryuk, Botya, and Moli, three magical backpacks, embark on a series of fantastical adventures, exploring hidden realms and encountering incredible creatures. Alyson Leigh Rosenfeld, Alyson Leigh Rosenfeld, Laurie Hymes, Laurie Hymes.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Three funny brother bears named Grizzly, Panda and Ice are fascinated by the human world and dream of emerging within its people. They try the human food and also befriend Chole, Charlie and Nom Nom to explore their local cultures. Daniel Chong, Eric Edelstein, Demetri Martin, Bobby Moynihan.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and his friends hope that their last summer together after graduating from high school would be glamorous and full of fun and adventures. But those mystery solvers are predestined to fight monsters even in their vacation. Frank Welker, Grey DeLisle, Kate Micucci, Mathew Lillard, Tom Kenny.

programme.title: The Tom And Jerry Show
programme.desc: Rick and Ginger aren't aware enough of the ongoing clashes and tricks between their cute pets; Tom, Jerry, and the bulldog Spike. Each animal has his unparalleled arsenal of tricks that is enough to beat the others. Stephen Stanton, Rick Zieff, Grey Griffin, Joey D'Auria, Kath Soucie, Darrell Van Citters, Stephanie Aurelio.

programme.title: Jellystone
programme.desc: Jellystone, a small and charmingly quaint town where residents peacefully go about their daily routines, is suddenly shaken by unexpected troubles that erupt without warning, disrupting the serene rhythm of life. C.H. Greenblatt, Grace Helbig, Georgie Kidder, Jeff Bergman, Dana Snyder, C.H. Greenblatt, Careen Ingle, Ian Wasseluk.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Camp Scare

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Three bear brothers want to be a part of human's society, so they do every possible thing to be like the around people.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Two old friends, a bird and a raccoon who work as groundskeepers at one of the parks spend most of their time trying to have fun and entertain themselves by all means. John Davis Infantino, Sean Szeles, J.G. Quintel, Sean Szeles.

Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: News Bulletin
programme.desc: Investigation Presenting the latest Arab and international developments in politics and economics and providing news reports and opinions of experts and specialists on significant events.

programme.title: Our Nation Is A Secretariat
programme.desc: Technology The documentation of the tireless efforts and profound sacrifices made by police officers across the Emirates stands as a powerful testament to their unwavering commitment and courage in keeping the country safe. Sofia Di Fay.

programme.title: Waves
programme.desc: Debate Discussing social and family issues to analyze risk factors and behavioral patterns that threaten family ties and community structures with the help of experts and researchers. Amira Mohamed, Alan Ghafry, Amira Mohamad.

programme.title: Rhyme
programme.desc: Arts Hosting specialists in poetry and culture to discuss the details of traditional poems and the various poets' creativity in using meter and rhyme. It also delves into the details of their journey and success. Abdullah Alkarbi.

programme.title: Ocean Wreck Investigation
programme.desc: History With the latest technologies, marine experts, investigators, and archaeologists dig deeper under the seas, searching for shipwrecks to tell the stories of many disasters.

programme.title: The Banshees Of Inisherin
programme.desc: Colm's sudden shift in behavior toward his longtime friend Pádraic compels the latter to confront him, only to learn that Colm wishes to end their friendship. The situation spirals when Pádraic refuses to accept it and continues to pursue him. Colin Farrell, Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: The Doctor
programme.desc: A team of experts and physicians provide health advice and debunk myths to positively impact people's lives.

programme.title: Masra
programme.desc: Focusing on the Al Aqsa mosque: its history, its connection to prophets and Jaws, and the challenges faced by the people in Gaza since the occupation.

programme.title: Know Him
programme.desc: Religion In each episode, the meaning of each of God's Beautiful Names is presented, allowing believers to better understand the God they worship and to connect the meanings of His names with the ethics and principles they should adhere to in their daily lives. Hany Habib, Mariam Sadon Al Ewish.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Desserts
programme.desc: If you are a foodie, it's your chance to join the presenter Seham Al-Hosseini in her journey to know different delicious foods and how to do them. Siham Al-Hossainy.

programme.desc: Exquisite main dishes and a delectable dessert are crafted, showcasing the meticulous cooking steps needed to make them. This process uncovers culinary secrets through innovative recipes, sparking new creativity in the kitchen.

programme.title: Be Safe

programme.title: A Woman's Youth
programme.desc: Imam leaves his rural life behind to become a doctor in Cairo, where a powerful older merchant decides he will be hers, and pursues him harder when she learns his heart is already with someone his own age. Ghada Abdel razeq, Youssef Omar, Mohammed Mahmoud, Mahmoud Hafez, Amr Wahba, Jory Bakr, Ahmed Hassan, Mohamed Soliman Abdel Maalek.

programme.title: Dopamine
programme.desc: Social media influences people to such an extent that it determines how they interact with each other. Most of the time, an application can control people's emotions. Reem Mustafa, Mohamed El-Kilany, Basant Shawky, Basel El zaro, Israa Rakha, Marwan Younes, Tiam Mostafa Qamar, Raouf Abdel Aziz, Mohamed Jalal, Reem Mostafa, Mohamed Kelany, Passant Shawky, Bassel Al Zaro, Tayam Amar.

programme.title: The Dreadful Whale
programme.desc: An elderly man's life is turned upside down when a device belonging to the Minister of Health falls into his hands as he embarks on a tough mission to return it at any cost. Mahmoud Abd Al Aziz, Farouk Al Fishawy, Lekaa El Khamissi, Ramy Waheed, Mervat Amin, Ahmad Samir Faraj, Sherif Badr Al din, Wael Hamdy, Farouq Al Fishawy, Farouq Al Fishawy.

programme.title: Forgotten Tale
programme.desc: Souad owns a marble factory and has to stand alone without support in the face of the greed of everyone around her and endless problems. Sawsan Badr, Ahmed Fahem, Mahmoud Hijazi, Abeer Sabry, Nancy Salah, Soaad Al Hajaan, Mahmoud Hemdan, Sawsan Badr, Ahmed Fahim, Mahmoud Hegazy.

programme.title: Grandma Zozo
programme.desc: Confronted with family chaos that includes marital issues and the conflicting impact of artificial intelligence on different members, Grandma Zozo fights to balance love and duty with technology. Esaad Younis, Mohamed El Kilany, Islam Ibrahim, Nada Mossa, Enas Kamel, Hamza El-eali, Nour Mahmoud, Sherin Adel, Mohamed Abdul Aziz, Mahmoud El Bezzawy, Nada Mousa, Hamza Al Eily, Shereen Adel, Mohamed Kelany.

programme.title: Despite The Law
programme.desc: When Laila's husband of ten years vanishes without a trace, she embarks on a relentless quest to uncover the truth. With their two children in tow, she'll stop at nothing to find him and unravel the secrets behind his disappearance. Eman Elassi, Hany Adel, Mohamed Al Qass, Farah Yossif, Waleed Fawaz, Shady Abd Al Salam, Naglaa Al-Hadini, Rehab Al Gamal, Jory Bakr, Eman El Assi, Farah Yousef, Shady Abdel Salam, Rehab El Gamal, Waleed Fawwaz.

programme.desc: Dogan leaves his family's dark and troubled past behind and runs away to start a new life with a new identity, but the past refuses to leave him alone and forces him to return once again when some secrets come to light. Cem Karci.

programme.title: The One I Loved
programme.desc: Erkan, a wealthy young man, meets Dicle, a simple girl from a rural village who has never left home. As their relationship grows and they marry, Dicle finally leaves her small village world for the city, a life completely different from the countryside. Gokcen Usta.

programme.title: Night
programme.desc: After years of separation, Ward, the ambassador's daughter, returns to the life of Najm Al Ghanem, the poor man who loved her and whom she loved in the past, carrying secrets and surprises that will change Najm's life forever. Carmen Bsaibes, Mahmoud Nasr.

programme.title: MBC News
programme.desc: Investigation Breaking news and information on the latest top stories, politics, weather, business, sports, and entertainment. Hagar Abdulah, Hiba Hidary, Gowi Ibrahim, Hagar Abdullah, Heba Hidary, Ghiwa Ibrahim.

programme.title: Women Talks
programme.desc: People Four brilliant women gather every week to discuss important issues and topics that vary between feminism, arts, culture and other interesting issues to all Arab family members. Fawziah Salama , Farah Baseso.

programme.title: A Cold Effect
programme.desc: After her daughter dies under mysterious circumstances, a forensic doctor uncovers the secrets of her daughter's life, including an undisclosed pregnancy, and seeks answers, particularly regarding her swimming team. Basem Shabou.

programme.title: Crew
programme.desc: Three hardworking women find themselves entangled in a dangerous web of deceit, their lives spiraling out of control as secrets unravel and truths collide. Tabu, Kareena Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Diljit Dosanjh, Kapil Sharma, Rajesh A Krishnan, Nidhi Mehra, Mehul Suri.

programme.title: Club 60
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their son, parents cannot live normally without him. And after the father committed several suicide trials, the mother decides to move to Mumbai together and live there. So they meet their cheerful neighbor who convinced them to join club 60 which its principle is life sixty.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: Romance A heartfelt love story of an impulsive young man and a principled girl with a pure heart. What begins as a sweet connection spirals into a storm of emotions, deception, and longing, testing the strength of love and trust.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: Drama A Strong-willed mother defies societal barriers for her daughter’s big dreams, but will destiny stand by their side.

An Indian cricket team proves the world wrong by participating and winning in a championship held in England, putting India on the cricket map with their stunning victory and making their fans proud. Ranveer Singh, Deepika Padukone, Tahir Raj Bhasin, Jiiva , Saqib Saleem, Kabir Khan, Sumit Arora, Vasan Bala.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Between Lines
programme.desc: While trying to save her show and pitching an idea to another, a renowned broadcaster is accused of murder. While her husband strives to prove her innocence, her long-buried secrets start coming to light. Saba Mubarak, Ahmed Fahmy, Nardin Farag, Ali Eltayeb, Salma Abo Dief, Mohamed Alaa, Waleed Fawaz, Mariam Naaom, Wael Farag, Salma Abu Deif, Mariam Naoum.

programme.title: From Sunday To Thursday
programme.desc: Three stories collide in a whirlwind of deception, betrayal, and conflict: Maha is drawn into a murder, Fatma falls prey to fraud, and a social media influencer becomes ensnared in an organ trafficking network. Fouz Al Shatti, Mohammad Al Dousari.

programme.title: Stiletto
programme.desc: A police officer investigates a murder that occurred at a party. During the investigations, he discovers many secrets related to everyone attended it. Karess Bashar, Dima Kandalaft, Nada Abou Farhaat, Rita Harb, Qays Sheikh Najib, Ender Emir, Lobna Meshlah, Mai Hayek.

programme.title: Sondos
programme.desc: Sondos is a poor kind girl who found herself in a family's home and has to be responsible for them and solve their problems, so would she be able to do so? Zuhair Qanno, Alaa Hamza, Hassna Aasiri, Mohamed Al Harby, Elham Ali, Fisal Alamry, Sara Al Yafee, Abdul Rahman Nafe, Wael Ghazy, Dina Mohsen, Alaa, Hassan Asiri, Mohammed Al Harbi.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: The Lair
programme.desc: Thriller Presenting multiple stories of different individuals, each seeking power or influence, and showing the methods they use to obtain or maintain it. Clarifying how this desire affects their decisions, behavior, and relationships with others. Mohamed Al Dammor, Rania Fahd.

programme.title: Ashraf's Dream
programme.desc: Ashraf, a lonely child raised in an orphanage, is drawn into the world of crime and eventually rises to become a powerful figure in it. But his life is suddenly thrown into chaos when he meets Nisan, an aspiring musician, and unexpectedly falls in love. Cagatay Ulusoy, Demet Ozdemir.

programme.title: Tas Kagit Makas
programme.desc: Accused of murder, a cleaner with Alzheimer's must reply on his son's incredible memory to prove his innocence. Together, they confront a powerful family in Istanbul, racing against time to uncover the truth. Ekin Koç, Ozan Güven, Serra Aritürk, Hüseyin Avni Danyal, Ertugrul Aytaç Usun, Yusuf Pirhasan, Volkan Keskin, Onur Dur, Ugras Günes, Serra Ariturk, Huseyin Avni Danyal.

programme.title: Wild Bees
programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou, Leonidas Kakouris, Dimitris Gkotsopoulos, Danai Mihalaki.

programme.title: Now Or Never
programme.desc: At forty four, eight women grapple with love, family, and career struggles. Together, they navigate life's challenges, determined to find stability and chase their dreams before time runs out. Somaya Al Khashab, Gomana Morad, Fatma Alsafi, Hamad Ashknani, Mays Gumir, Huda Al Khateeb, Al Muthana Subh, Heba Mashari Hamada, Abeer Ahmad, Huda El Khateib, Muthanna Sobh.

programme.title: The Rebel
programme.desc: A young man seeks to fulfill his dream of professional boxing after his parents are involved in an accident that causes their death. Hend Nezar, Aly Lio, Ryad Shahid, Taha Al Mashhadni, Hussein Ajjaj, Yazan Abo Hemda, Nada Emad Khalil, Hend Nizar, Ali Leo.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Fire With Fire
programme.desc: Mariam suffers from the ravages of the war in Syria, so she flees to Lebanon in an attempt to establish a new life in the presence of many difficulties and obstacles. Abed Fahd, Karess Bashar, George Khabbaz, Tony Essa, Zeina Mekky, Mohamed Abdul Aziz, Rami Kussa, Aabed Fahd.

programme.title: Darsh
programme.desc: No one knows who exactly Darsh is, as he is a man who moves between lives with ease, appearing and vanishing at will, concealing an intricate network of secrets that keeps his true identity forever hidden. Mostafa Shabaan, Sahar El Saigh.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: Now Or Never

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Fire With Fire
programme.desc: Mariam suffers from the ravages of the war in Syria, so she flees to Lebanon in an attempt to establish a new life in the presence of many difficulties and obstacles. Abed Fahd, Karess Bashar, George Khabbaz, Tony Essa, Zeina Mekky, Mohamed Abdul Aziz, Rami Kussa, Aabed Fahd.

programme.title: Darsh
programme.desc: No one knows who exactly Darsh is, as he is a man who moves between lives with ease, appearing and vanishing at will, concealing an intricate network of secrets that keeps his true identity forever hidden. Mostafa Shabaan, Sahar El Saigh.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Release
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murdering his wife, Abbas Al Rayes is sentenced to fifteen years in prison. After his release, Abbas is consumed by a thirst for revenge and a desire for salvation. Amr Saad, Hatem Salah.

programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: Gaber seeks refuge in the distant village of Al Adliyyah, where he is worshipped as the long-awaited figure, but beneath the reverence lies a man on the verge of exposure, haunted by whispers of his own deception. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri, Huda Hussain.

programme.title: Hamdiya
programme.desc: Poverty-stricken Hamdiya's life gets even more difficult after her mother's death and her father's remarriage. Between her family situation and her arduous work, Hamdiya is reeling until life finally grants her a unique and unparalleled love. Rowaida Shahin, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Ramez and The Ultimate Level
programme.desc: Ramez Galal returns with a new set of pranks for Ramadan this year, where he hosts a group of entertainment and sports stars to put them through difficult challenges that test their composure. Ramez Galal.

programme.title: Win The Millions
programme.desc: Game Offering a great opportunity to win some cash by getting on the phone and answering questions.

programme.title: The Children Grown Up
programme.desc: A comedic story of Ramadan's family who lost hope in his children, where everyone lives in his world. So he decides to escape but when his son knows the plan, he informs his siblings to prevent him to travel and save their family from loss. Younes Shalaby, Ahmed Zaki, Said Saleh, Hassan Mustafa, Karima Mokhtar, Bahjat Qamar, Samir Khafajy, Samir Al Asfouri, Abdallah Alsheikh, Saied Saleh, Samir Khafagy.

programme.title: Coma D

programme.title: Sweet Sour
programme.desc: Saadoun goes through exciting comedic situations daily with his friends and family, which reflect Iraqi society's problems and social issues sarcastically and gently. Ehsan Dadosh, Ali Jaber.

programme.desc: Saudi producer and actor Hassan Al Asery pulls humorous pranks on celebrities. In each episode, he invites a star for a daring interview, showcasing their funny and occasionally serious responses. Hassan Al Asery.

Together, they navigate life's challenges, determined to find stability and chase their dreams before time runs out. Al Muthana Subh, Heba Mashari Hamada, Somaya Al Khashab, Jumana Murad, Fatma Alsafi, Hamad Ashknani, Mays Gumir, Huda Al Khateeb, Gomana Morad, Abeer Ahmad, Huda El Khateib, Muthanna Sobh.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Fire With Fire
programme.desc: Mariam suffers from the ravages of the war in Syria, so she flees to Lebanon in an attempt to establish a new life in the presence of many difficulties and obstacles. Abed Fahd, Karess Bashar, George Khabbaz, Tony Essa, Zeina Mekky, Mohamed Abdul Aziz, Rami Kussa, Aabed Fahd.

programme.title: Darsh
programme.desc: No one knows who exactly Darsh is, as he is a man who moves between lives with ease, appearing and vanishing at will, concealing an intricate network of secrets that keeps his true identity forever hidden. Mostafa Shabaan, Sahar El Saigh.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: The Slaughterhouse
programme.desc: After her husband's death, Afkar runs his business in slaughterhouse. But her rivals, Hamdan and Jaber, fabricate a charge of selling rotten meat against her. So when she is released from jail, she sets out to take revenge on them. programme.title: Touha

programme.title: The Witness Who Didn't See Anything
programme.desc: When his neighbor is found murdered, a gentle children's TV actor is dragged into a courtroom as a key witness, even though he saw nothing, sparking a series of hilarious misunderstandings. programme.desc: . The latest news from the BBC. Naga Munchetty, Ben Thompson, Joanna Gosling, Annita McVeigh, David Eades, Geeta Guru-Murthy, Maryam Moshiri, Emily Jung, Adnan Nawaz, Mike Embley, Sally Bundock, Alpa Patel.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: The Iran War
programme.desc: . A daily briefing from BBC News on the latest developments on the Israel-US war in Iran.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: Baby Brain: What's Really Going On?
programme.desc: . Forgetfulness, brain fog, the inability to focus - baby brain is a concept many mums can relate to. But what's really going on inside the brains of mums-to-be? We go inside the world's largest study.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: . The latest news from the BBC. Naga Munchetty, Ben Thompson, Joanna Gosling, Annita McVeigh, David Eades, Geeta Guru-Murthy, Maryam Moshiri, Emily Jung, Adnan Nawaz, Mike Embley, Sally Bundock, Alpa Patel.

programme.title: Spirit of Yachting
programme.desc: marks the 64th anniversary of the Rolex China Sea Race. It's a nearly 600-mile race from Hong Kong's Victoria Harbour to Subic Bay in the Philippines.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: . The latest news from the BBC. Naga Munchetty, Ben Thompson, Joanna Gosling, Annita McVeigh, David Eades, Geeta Guru-Murthy, Maryam Moshiri, Emily Jung, Adnan Nawaz, Mike Embley, Sally Bundock, Alpa Patel.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen
programme.desc: . Passionate and creative cook Rachel Khoo goes in search of new ideas in this vibrant and fascinating series. Rachel travels to some of the most beautiful foodie countries in the world, heading for cosmopolitan locations both urban and rural to get inspiration for dinner parties with her friends back home. Rachel Khoo.

programme.title: Social Injustice
programme.desc: Returning to his rural hometown, Hassan seeks to settle scores and prove his intentions to Hend, the love of his life. Despite being a wife and mother, she turns to him in a crisis, finding his help as her only escape. Eyad Nassar, Fathy Abdel Wahhab, Riham Abdel Ghafour, Basma, Ahmad Azmy, Diab, Hany Khalifa, Ahmed Fawzy Saleh, Muhammad Ragaa, Hani Khalifa, Mohamed Ragaa.

programme.title: When Love Strikes
programme.desc: Lail sees her husband, Youssef, in a new light when she discovers he's having an affair. Despite their separation, they remain connected through their children, and things grow more complicated when she falls into a forbidden love. Yasmin Abdelaziz, Kareem Fahmy, Nicole Saba, Khaled Selim, Anoushka, Salah Abdallah, Passant Shawky, Mahmoud Amr Yassin, Eman Al Sayed, Badriah Tolbah, Rashwan Tawfik, Hanaan Suleiman, Mohammed Hamdi Al Khabiri, Amr Mahmoud Yasin, Yasmin Abdel aziz, Karim Fahmy, Mohamed Hamdy Al Khabeeri, Amr Mahmoud Yassin.

programme.title: From Sunday To Thursday
programme.desc: Three stories collide in a whirlwind of deception, betrayal, and conflict: Maha is drawn into a murder, Fatma falls prey to fraud, and a social media influencer becomes ensnared in an organ trafficking network. Fouz Al Shatti, Mohammad Al Dosari.

programme.title: September Breezes
programme.desc: Roula returns to her home in a rural Syrian village, where her grandmother, Umm Fawaz, still lives. Unexpected events force her to stay longer than she thought, and her life converges with youth and the elderly in her village. Sabah Al Jazaaery, Muhammad Hadaki, Leen Gherra, Yazan Al Rishani, Asema Yousef, Ali Stouf, Karam Shanan, Waddah Halloum, Wael Zeidan, Ibrahim Al Sheikh, Rana Gamol, Hussain Abbas, Ghizoan Al Safdy, Sawsan Abu Afar, Darwish Abdel Hadi, Rawad Alio, Rasha Sharbtgy, Yazan Hisham Sharbatji, Ali Alsaleh, Nadine Tahseeine bek, Mhamad Hdakki, Ghazwan Al Safadi, Rasha Hisham Shurbatji, Ali Moeen Saleh, Sabah Jazairi, Mohamed Hdakki, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

Ayman Zidan, Amal Arafa, Shukran Murtaja, Safaa Soltan, Abd Al Monem Amairy, Tamer Eshak, Mohamed Alaas, Tamer Isaak, Shoukran Mortaja, Abdulmounem Amayri, Ayman Zeidan, Tamer Is-haak, Safaa Sultaan, Tamer Isaac, Abdul Mounem Amayri, Aml Arafa, Abdel Moneim Amyri.

programme.title: With Love
programme.desc: Trapped by the fear of losing her son, Mayar agrees to find a temporary husband to appease her dangerous and controlling ex-husband. However, in an unexpected turn, she finds solace, warmth, and respect in a single Didi driver. Asser Yasin, Mai Ezz Al Din, Diab, Ashraf Abdelbaqi, Ahmed Khaled Saleh, Ayda Reyad, Tamer Mohsen, Maha Al Wazeer, Tamer Mohsen, Mai Ezz El Deen, Ashraf Abdel baqi, Ayda Riyad, Mai Ezz El Din, Ahmed Khaled Salleh.

programme.title: Sadaf
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Detective Shaheen investigates the mysterious disappearance of several women, as the kidnapper leaves behind photos of them at the crime scene as the only clue, increasing the mystery and containing unexpected secrets. Abdel Rahman Al Aqel, Hussain Al Mahdi, Buthaina Al Raisi, Ahmad Iraj, Abdulah Bahman, Ghadeer Al Sabti, Khaled Al Ajereb, Fay Al Sharqawi, Naser Abbas, Fahad Basem, Smood Al Mo'men, Nour Mahmoud, Abbas Khalifi, Zaman Abduallah, Ahmed Al Sadoun, Haneen Hamed, Hasan Ibrahim, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad, Abdullah Al Edan, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad.

programme.title: When Love Strikes
programme.desc: Lail sees her husband, Youssef, in a new light when she discovers he's having an affair. Despite their separation, they remain connected through their children, and things grow more complicated when she falls into a forbidden love. programme.title: From Sunday To Thursday
programme.desc: Three stories collide in a whirlwind of deception, betrayal, and conflict: Maha is drawn into a murder, Fatma falls prey to fraud, and a social media influencer becomes ensnared in an organ trafficking network. Fouz Al Shatti, Mohammad Al Dosari.

programme.desc: History A religious discussion exploring the qualities of the faithful in the Quran and Sunnah, highlighting the traits that distinguish believers and draw them closer to God. Diaa Al Swaidaan.

programme.title: The Holy Quran
programme.desc: Islam Verses from the Holy Quran are being recited in a melodious and reverent manner by a distinguished assembly of esteemed and venerable Quran reciters.

programme.title: Al Sharjah Morning
programme.desc: People The audience are on a daily date to immerse themselves in a wonderful UAE experience, engaging in heartfelt conversations about community matters and spreading joy with every smile. Rasha Matar , Muhamad AlFarajawy.

programme.title: Advisory Opinions
programme.desc: Religion Religious scholars respond to people inquiries from a religious perspective. It spots the light on the new phenomena in society and how should we treat them. Sheikh Dr. Aziz Farhan, Aziz Bin Farhan Al Anzy.

programme.title: The Register Of The Arabs
programme.desc: Debate Insightful interviews with Arabic-speaking writers and poets that delve into their life stories, creative paths, and artistic philosophies, offering audiences a closer look at the experiences and inspirations that shaped their literary careers.

programme.title: The Origin Of Letters
programme.desc: History An overview of Arabic calligraphy that traces its historical origins, highlights the main stages of its development, and presents the most famous script styles with a clear introduction to the defining features of each.

programme.title: Flavors In Sharjah
programme.desc: Show Chef Ahmed Darwish travels across the Emirate of Sharjah, exploring its stunning natural settings and transforming each location into an open kitchen where he creates irresistible, delicious dishes infused with freshness, creativity, and local spirit.

programme.title: In The Expanse Of Surah
programme.desc: Religion Simplified and attractive method to provide an interpretation of the meanings of the Holy Quran in the light of the rules of knowledge and in line with modern human thought. Moreover, there is a full description of every Surah of the Holy Quran. Mohammed Hassan Khalaf, Raed Al Dalati.

programme.title: Then I Was Guided
programme.desc: Hosting persons newly converted to Islam, shedding light on the daily life of new Muslims in their societies and revealing their role in defending Islam.

programme.title: The Sent Goodness
programme.desc: Religion The Sharjah Charity Society takes the lead to help poor people and needy ones by doing different charitable projects around the world. yousef Shaaban.

programme.title: Al Qasimia Schools
programme.desc: History An in-depth overview of Al Qasimia University's Quran memorization schools in Africa, capturing learning environments, teaching methods, student stories, and the educational mission that embodies Sharjah's commitment to spreading Quranic education.

programme.title: The Origin Of Letters
programme.desc: History An overview of Arabic calligraphy that traces its historical origins, highlights the main stages of its development, and presents the most famous script styles with a clear introduction to the defining features of each.

programme.title: The Setting Sun
programme.desc: A family returns from abroad with a young girl everyone believes is their daughter, but the truth is later revealed. The head of the family's refusal to adopt her sparks conflicts in the neighborhood and creates tensions among the residents. Dana Jabr, Abeer Shams Al Den.

programme.title: As The Saying Goes
programme.desc: Arts Rashed Al Mazrooi delves into the fascinating world of proverbs, unraveling their hidden meanings, tracing their cultural and historical contexts, and demonstrating how these seemingly simple sayings carry profound life lessons. Rashed Ahmed Al Mazrooi.

programme.title: Advisory Opinions
programme.desc: Religion Religious scholars respond to people inquiries from a religious perspective. It spots the light on the new phenomena in society and how should we treat them. Sheikh Dr. Aziz Farhan, Aziz Bin Farhan Al Anzy.

programme.title: The News
programme.desc: Newscast Providing timely, accurate, and comprehensive coverage of the most important and latest news, delivering key developments as they happen, and keeping audiences fully informed about events shaping the world around them.

programme.title: Architectural Treasures
programme.desc: History Tours that carry the scent of history and highlight the efforts of Sharjah in restoring Emirati heritage houses, some of which have been transformed into museums and tourist sites that reflect the architectural heritage of the Emirate.

programme.desc: People Addressing the suggestions and complaints raised by citizens and residents of the UAE involves actively engaging with them, thoroughly understanding their concerns, and collaboratively working with officials in relevant government agencies.

programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Focusing on the most pressing social issues people face by narrating numerous human stories and hosting several experts to discuss possible solutions for each problem, thus benefiting the viewers. Abdullah Al Zarouni.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: Our Nation Is A Secretariat
programme.desc: Technology The documentation of the tireless efforts and profound sacrifices made by police officers across the Emirates stands as a powerful testament to their unwavering commitment and courage in keeping the country safe. Sofia Di Fay.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Focusing on the most pressing social issues people face by narrating numerous human stories and hosting several experts to discuss possible solutions for each problem, thus benefiting the viewers. Abdullah Al Zarouni.

programme.title: My Family Home
programme.desc: In 1940s Damascus, the murder of famed doctor Abd Al Rahman Al Shahbandar sends shockwaves through a quiet neighborhood. As suspicion falls on everyone, the sudden return of the enigmatic Nouri raises questions, and maybe answers. Ayman Zidan, Salom Haddaad, Sabah Barakat, Abdul Fatah Al Myzayen, Safaa Soltan, Tamer Eshak, Fouad Shorbagy, Tamer Isaak, Ayman Zeidan, Abd Elfatah Almozyen, Safaa Sultaan, Tamer Isaac, Salloum Haddad.

programme.title: The Postman
programme.desc: Newton, the mailman, causes problems for many of the people he delivers letters to, which threatens his fate, as this prompts them to file complaints against him at his workplace. Gaber Nghmosh, Jomaa Ali, Metha Mohamed, Khalil Alrimisy, Mais Kumar , Marwa Khalil, Albassam Ali, Mohamed Al Qaffaas, Ahmed Al Fardan, Juma Ali, Maitha mohammed, Khalil Al Romaithi, Mays Gumir, Mohammad Al Qaffaas, Ahmad Al Fardan, Hamad Al Shahabi, Mohammad Al Qaffas, Hamad Al Shehabi, Jaber Naghmoush.

programme.title: Rhyme
programme.desc: Arts Hosting specialists in poetry and culture to discuss the details of traditional poems and the various poets' creativity in using meter and rhyme. It also delves into the details of their journey and success. Abdullah Alkarbi.

programme.title: International News
programme.desc: Newscast Comprehensive coverage of all the breaking Arab and global news comes to you live from the heart of the events, and hosts officials and decision-makers to learn their opinions.

programme.title: Breezes
programme.desc: Discussing the most important societal and family topics, particularly marital relations and the proper way to ensure the psychological and physical well-being of children, from an Islamic perspective, drawing on the Qur'an and Sunnah. George Sakr, Maria Al Hattali.

programme.title: The Fate Of Our Horoscope
programme.desc: Preeta and Shrishti's father confesses on his deathbed that their mother, Sarla, has two other daughters and they all live in Mumbai. The two sisters set out on a journey to Mumbai to find their family and connect with them. Dheeraj Dhoopar, Shraddha Arya.

programme.title: Roxy Nights
programme.desc: A talented actress pursues her dream of starring in Syria's first feature film, but the escalating political turmoil in the Damascus neighborhood under French rule disrupts her journey, jeopardizing both her success and her long-awaited hope. Ayman Zeidan, Sulaf Fawakherji, Dared Lahham, Mona Wasef, Majd Feddah, Mohamed Abdelaziz, Shadi Kiwan, Ayman Zidan, Duraid Laham, Mona Wassef, Majd Fidha, Juan Al Khedr, Mohamed Abdul Aziz, Mohamed Abdul Aziz.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.
